prompt: Based on the provided [Title], automatically generate a high-end Chinese conceptual poster. User only provides Title: Enter title here. Your task: Understand the theme, mood, social issues, and metaphors behind the title, then complete the visual design. Do not mechanically illustrate the title; translate it into a cinematic, magazine-style visual poster. 1. Style: High-end horizontal concept poster. Mood can range from social issues, psychological insights, humanity, intimacy, to workplace pressure. It should look like a deep-dive article cover or art exhibition visual. 2. Layout: Large title on the left/top, visual metaphor on the right/bottom. Strong relationship between text and image. High impact, memory points, and whitespace. Default to landscape 16:9, 4:3, or 3:1. 3. Typography: Main title must be huge and central. Subtitle generated automatically (max 24 characters) explaining the deep issue. Bottom tags (4-6) separated by vertical lines. Fonts matched to theme (Serif for social critique, bold Sans-serif for psychological insight). 4. Visual Metaphor: Use elements like broken statues, empty chairs, mirrors, night cityscapes, or medical images. Focus on 1 strong metaphor + 2-4 details. 5. Atmosphere: Low saturation, advanced lighting, cinematic grain, depth of emotion. No cute or bright internet template styles. 6. Output: A single high-res 4K complete poster in Chinese. No process explanation, just the image.
